summary: Completed comprehensive testing of TratorShop new features: WhatsApp validation, admin edit modal, vendedor API with social links, and duplicate listing protection. All 17 backend tests passed. Frontend UI working correctly.
passed_tests: WhatsApp validation - registration without WhatsApp fails with 400
WhatsApp validation - registration with short number (<10 digits) fails
WhatsApp validation - registration with valid number succeeds
Vendedor API returns facebook and instagram fields
Admin can update user social links (instagram, facebook)
Admin can update user password (bcrypt hashed)
Duplicate listing protection returns existing listing
Admin login with correct credentials succeeds
Admin login with wrong password fails
seed_data_creation: Created test users during WhatsApp validation tests (test_valid_phone_* emails)
context_for_next_testing_agent: All requested features are working: 1) WhatsApp is mandatory on registration with proper validation (10-13 digits), 2) Admin edit modal has all fields including password, instagram, facebook, 3) Vendedor API returns social links, 4) Duplicate listing protection works within 60 seconds window. The seller profile page correctly displays website, instagram, and facebook when they have values.

whatsapp_mandatory_registration.details: Frontend validates 10-13 digits, backend validates same. Error message: 'Informe um WhatsApp válido para continuar'

vendedor_api_social_links.details: GET /api/vendedor/{user_id} returns facebook and instagram fields

seller_profile_page.details: Displays website, instagram, facebook when populated

duplicate_listing_protection.details: Returns existing listing if same title created within 60 seconds
